appointment_modal.guest_email_help: Only one pending appointment request can exist per email at a time. Submitting a new request will invalidate any earlier pending request for the same email.
appointment_modal.error_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
appointment_modal.error_pending_exists: A pending appointment request already exists for this email. Please try again in a moment or use a different email address.
appointment_modal.success_body: Your appointment request has been submitted and is now pending. You'll receive an email once the nutritionist responds.
